AboutWindow.title: About Me
AboutWindow.name: I Wayan Agus Darmawan
AboutWindow.bio: Computer Engineering graduate (2025) from Institut Teknologi Sepuluh Nopember with experience in full-stack web development, completing over 20 freelance projects. Skilled in building responsive web applications, dashboards, and custom solutions using React and Express. Additionally experienced in robotics software, contributing to ROS-based autonomous robots and inspection systems — integrating software with hardware, implementing navigation and control systems, and ensuring reliable real-world performance.

ContactWindow.title: Contact
ContactWindow.subtitle: Let's build something together
ContactWindow.messagePlaceholder: Tell me about your project or idea…

roboticsEngineer.title: Robotics Engineer
responsibilities: Designed, developed, and tested quadruped inspection robots for electrical substations, including ROS-based applications, custom GUI interfaces, and automated inspection features
Led outdoor localization and mapping improvements, resolving LIO challenges using RTK GPS to ensure precise navigation in complex environments
Performed extensive field testing and delivered technical demonstrations to end users, supporting industrial applications across PLN, Pertamina (oil & gas), and PTPN plantations

juniorRoboticsEngineer.title: Junior Robotics Engineer
responsibilities: Implemented base system integration on Deep Robotics Lite3 and X30 quadruped robots to support PPE detection applications and indoor autonomous navigation
Developed ROS-based base programs integrating LiDAR–Inertial Odometry (LIO) navigation and thermal imaging for electrical substation inspection
Built basic web-based monitoring for telemetry and inspection visualization

researchMentor.title: Research Mentor
responsibilities: Mentored middle and high school students for KOPSI, FIKSI, and national-level innovation competitions, guiding technical project development and scientific research writing
Supported multidisciplinary student projects across IoT, Machine Learning, Embedded Systems, and Web Development
Ensured structured project execution, timely proposal delivery, and consistent competition participation with multiple returning mentees

roboticsSoftwareEngineer.title: Robotics Software Engineer – iCar ITS
responsibilities: Implemented and enhanced ROS-based autonomous driving software on Ubuntu, improving LiDAR-based obstacle avoidance and vehicle stability through PID parameter tuning
Integrated Direct LiDAR–Inertial Odometry fused with GPS for reliable localization in both GPS-available and GPS-denied environments
Designed and developed a real-time web-based monitoring, tracking, and maintenance logging system using Next.js integrated with ROS (rosbridge/roslib)

roboticsEngineerAsv.title: Robotics Engineer – Hidrooseanografi ASV
responsibilities: Developed and tested a ROS-based autonomous navigation system for an ASV with RViz-based control and monitoring interface
Implemented Pure Pursuit path-following using GPS RTK and IMU localization and buoy obstacle avoidance using YOLO-based object detection
Conducted system integration and field testing collaborating with MBKM ITS teams, Robomarine, and STTAL as end user

labAssistant.title: Laboratory Assistant
responsibilities: Engineered full-stack ROS-based autonomy and manipulation systems, integrating perception, mapping, localization, motion planning, control, and behavior decision architectures
Validated autonomous robotic capabilities through real-world deployment and high-fidelity simulations (Gazebo, Isaac Sim, Webots)
Led Digital Circuit laboratory modernization, managing teaching assistants and enhancing practical learning effectiveness

divisionLeader.title: Electrical-Programming Division Leader
responsibilities: Led the Electrical & Programming Division as a hands-on robotics engineer, contributing to electrical system design, autonomous software development, and overall robot architecture
Designed and built end-to-end robotic platforms integrating electrical systems, sensor stack selection, control software, and system integration for competition-ready deployments
Coordinated with mechanical and non-technical teams while balancing mission requirements, technical performance, and budget constraints

roboticsSoftwareEngineer.title: Robotics Software Engineer
responsibilities: Developed ROS-based autonomous navigation systems for an Autonomous Surface Vehicle (ASV), integrating multi-sensor fusion of LiDAR, camera, GPS, IMU, and compass
Implemented PID-based thruster control and real-time sensor data processing enabling fully autonomous maritime navigation
Collaborated with electrical and computer vision teams to deliver fully integrated autonomous robotic systems deployed in KKI 2022, IRC 2023, and KKI 2023

fullStackDeveloper.title: Full Stack Developer
responsibilities: Developed an internal Career Management Platform featuring Easy Apply and automated CV standardization, building candidate, recruiter, and admin dashboards with RBAC and Docker deployment
Engineered backend services for a Document Tracking system using AdonisJS, implementing secure authentication, role management, email verification, and workflow monitoring
Designed the concept architecture of an IoT-based NVR Monitoring System to monitor surveillance device operational status

frontendDeveloper.title: Frontend Developer
responsibilities: Developed the official MAGE 9 ITS landing website using Next.js and Tailwind CSS as first professional web development project
Took full ownership of development when other team members were unavailable, self-learning Next.js while maintaining and deploying the production website
Implemented responsive UI and Firebase authentication integration

ubuntuPortfolio.name: Ubuntu Portfolio
ubuntuPortfolio.desc: Interactive OS-themed developer portfolio with draggable windows, Spotify integration, i18n, and dark mode.
ubuntuPortfolio.longDesc: A fully interactive Ubuntu 22.04 GNOME desktop simulation built as a developer portfolio.

asvNavigation.name: ASV Autonomous Navigation
asvNavigation.desc: ROS-based autonomous navigation system for Autonomous Surface Vehicle with multi-sensor fusion, winning Grand Champion at IRC 2023.
asvNavigation.longDesc: Full autonomous navigation stack for maritime competition robot integrating LiDAR, camera, GPS, IMU, and compass for fully autonomous operation.

quadrupedInspection.name: Quadruped Inspection Robot
quadrupedInspection.desc: ROS-based inspection system for electrical substations using Deep Robotics X30, thermal imaging, and LiDAR-Inertial Odometry.
quadrupedInspection.longDesc: Industrial-grade inspection robot system for PLN substations and Pertamina oil & gas facilities, featuring autonomous navigation and PPE detection.

icarMonitoring.name: iCar ITS Web Monitoring
icarMonitoring.desc: Real-time web monitoring dashboard for autonomous vehicle telemetry, built with Next.js + ROS bridge integration.
icarMonitoring.longDesc: Production monitoring system for the iCar ITS autonomous vehicle project, providing live telemetry, tracking, and maintenance logging.

careerPlatform.name: Career Management Platform
careerPlatform.desc: Internal HR platform with Easy Apply, automated CV standardization, and role-based access control built for PT Satkomindo.
careerPlatform.longDesc: Full-stack career management platform featuring candidate, recruiter, and admin dashboards with Docker containerized deployment.

handGestureRobot.name: Hand Gesture Recognition Robot
handGestureRobot.desc: Lightweight deep learning system for real-time hand gesture recognition enabling collaborative robot control.
handGestureRobot.longDesc: Published research: real-time gesture recognition system using lightweight CNN for collaborative robot (cobot) control without physical interfaces.
